CustomField.description: Mirrors the current status of the related Asset for reporting purposes. [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:Contract Diary records are not data-loaded. They are created through a scheduler/flow.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows the current status of the associated Asset.
CustomField.label: Asset Status
